contracts.description: Keep the old bottom-status style: a below-main boxed widget for live team activity. Completed reports arrive as messages/collapsed reports and do not create report-ready or waiting-confirmation status rows.

Active agent information remains available in the below-main status and /team for both readers and writers, including elapsed/running time, current status/action, model, thinking level, and token count when available. Duplicate active/history entries are preserved rather than hidden.
A read helper spawned for a writer records and displays requestedBy metadata as requested by <writer>.
Writer agents never spawn agents directly; they only request helpers/teammates, and the lead/main runtime performs the spawn.

Readers send completion messages to the lead; read helpers for writers send the full report to the writer and a short done notification to the lead. Messaging should push instead of requiring polling.
When a reader or writer is done it is removed from active UI/status, but its final report remains visible from /team history.
/team works without team_create initialization by showing a no-team/no-current-team message instead of breaking.
Writer tmux panes close only after the writer sends its final report and completes cleanup.
